summary: Raw warning triage cleared blank published metadata debt, and the follow-up raw-vs-registry backlog was later closed by the 2026-04-21 batch ingest plus route correction pass.

observations.problem: The vault currently contains 180 raw files that are present on disk but absent from ops/raw-registry.json, so raw warning closeout cannot be completed by metadata normalization alone.
observations.why_it_matters: Release-clean and raw preflight review become noisy when fresh raw capture backlog is mixed with true contract drift, and operators lack one stable artifact that separates triage backlog from content defects.
observations.automation_candidate: Add a deterministic raw backlog triage report or registry-stub generator that diffs raw/ against ops/raw-registry.json and emits review-ready backlog artifacts before full ingest work begins.
observations.suggested_followup: Closed by the 2026-04-21 raw intake batch and follow-up route correction. Remaining automation need is tracked separately as raw_intake_route_classifier_review_gate.
